title: SQL Query Optimisation Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of indexes, EXPLAIN, and query rewriting strategies.

questions.question: What does a 'Seq Scan' in EXPLAIN output indicate?

options.text: The query is using an index efficiently
The entire table is being scanned row by row
The query uses a hash join
The query result is cached

questions.question: Why should you avoid using a function on an indexed column in a WHERE clause?

options.text: Functions are not allowed in SQL WHERE clauses
It prevents the database from using the index
It causes a syntax error
It forces a hash join instead of a merge join

questions.question: What is a partial index best suited for?

options.text: Indexing only the most recently inserted rows
Indexing only rows matching a specific condition
Indexing multiple columns at once
Speeding up aggregate functions

questions.question: Which PostgreSQL command updates table statistics for the query planner?

options.text: REFRESH
REINDEX
ANALYZE
UPDATE STATISTICS

questions.question: What is the main benefit of table partitioning?

options.text: It reduces the number of indexes needed
It allows queries to scan only relevant partitions instead of the full table
It compresses data automatically
It speeds up INSERT operations
